items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Spurs, Newcastle eye former Liverpool striker Núñez
items.description: Tottenham Hotspur and Newcastle United are among the clubs interested in signing Al Hilal striker Darwin Núñez. Transfer Talk has the latest.

items.title: Messi struggles in MLS opener, will it impact his World Cup hopes?
items.description: Lionel Messi had a decent game in the 3-0 defeat to LAFC, but decent isn't what you expect from him, especially during a World Cup year.

items.title: UCLA swats 'negativity,' authors 23-point rally
items.description: Donovan Dent hit a layup at the buzzer in overtime to lift UCLA over No. 10 Illinois 95-94 on Saturday after the Bruins rallied from a 23-point defici...

items.title: Former Purdue, NFL receiver Moore dies at 25
items.description: Former Purdue and NFL wide receiver Rondale Moore died Saturday at the age of 25, according to the Minnesota Vikings.
